use_cases: Landing page main sections with primary and secondary call-to-action buttons
Marketing websites showcasing key value propositions
App entry points with multiple navigation options
ai_summary: A versatile hero section component featuring a headline area with two action buttons. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for button variant theming. Supports multiple button styles including default, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants with size options.
